title: glochidion hayatae
intro: Glochidion hayatae, also known as Hayata's Glochidion, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is a shrub that is native to Taiwan and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include relieving symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. Glochidion hayatae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
